tools.name: fitness_calc_macros
tools.description: Calculate daily calorie and macronutrient targets from body stats and fitness goal. Uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation for BMR and activity multipliers for TDEE. Use when the user asks for macro targets, calorie goals, or wants to plan their nutrition.

activity_level.description: Activity level: sedentary (little/no exercise), light (1-3 days/week), moderate (3-5 days/week), active (6-7 days/week), very_active (twice daily or physical job).

goal.description: Fitness goal: cut (lose fat), maintain, bulk (build muscle).

deficit_pct.description: Calorie deficit/surplus percentage. Defaults to 20% for cut, 0% for maintain, 15% for bulk.

tools.name: fitness_log_meal
tools.description: Log a meal entry with calories and macronutrients. Use when the user tells you what they ate, mentions a meal, or wants to track food intake. Meal type should be breakfast, lunch, dinner, or snack.

meal_type.description: Which meal this entry is for.

food_name.description: Name of the food or dish.

tools.name: fitness_nutrition_lookup
tools.description: Look up nutrition information for a food item. Searches USDA FoodData Central (if an API key is configured) or OpenFoodFacts (free, no key). Use when the user asks about calories, macros, or nutrition for a specific food, or wants to find a product by barcode.

query.description: Food name to search for, or a barcode number.

page_size.description: Max results to return. Defaults to 5.

data_source.description: Which data source to use. 'auto' uses USDA if an API key is configured, otherwise falls back to OpenFoodFacts. Defaults to 'auto'.
